nodes.label: ws_term() — Real PTY Terminal WS (/ws/term, pywinpty)
nodes.rationale: Full shell = arbitrary code execution BY DESIGN (local personal tool, per spec security section). One PtyProcess per connection; pty.read is bridged to async via run_in_executor; tolerates raw key frames that are not JSON.

nodes.label: Real PTY Terminal Bridge (pywinpty ConPTY ↔ WebSocket ↔ xterm.js)
nodes.rationale: Pattern: server spawns a real Windows ConPTY per WS connection (PowerShell or WSL), pumps raw bytes to the browser where xterm.js renders them; input/resize travel as JSON frames the other way. Multiple connections = multiple independent terminals.

edges.source_location: full-shell terminals are the power tier of the cockpit's two-tier execution model
